results.description: Flat chart: baseline fitting and normal stability.
Smooth curved chart: LSQ and curvature fidelity.
Two planes with a sharp crease: voxel-boundary and multi-patch behavior.
Same smooth sheet as 'sine' but with a dense central cluster plus sparse background: stresses density-adaptive voxel subdivision (run with --adaptive-voxel to exercise it).
Planar triangular support: outer-boundary coverage and precision.
Planar U-shaped support: concavity and connected-support preservation.
Planar crescent support: curved outer and inner boundaries.
Planar annular support: hole preservation and Euler-equivalent topology.
